author: Ethan Yang
name: Record: int5 GPTQ + 33.6M model (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1179)
blurb: Breakthrough: int5 quantization ([-15,15]) with GPTQ error compensation enables 33.6M params in 16MB. MHA 8/8, BigramHash 8192, MLP 3.5x, XSA all 11 layers. GPTQ makes int5 nearly lossless (0.001 BPB quant tax). Combined with early QAT 0.5, EMA 0.997, and legal score-first AdamW TTT.
